name: Fried Rice#1
recipeIngredient: 1 cup to 2 cups of leftover meat (roast, chicken, pork chops)
1 bunch green onions, chopped or - chives
1 cup bean sprouts or shredded lettuce
4 cups to 6 cups of leftover, cold cooked rice
2 tablespoons soy sauce in 1/2 cup of water
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and fry until just firm in about 1 tablespoon of oil. Remove from the wok.
2. Cut meat into bite-sized pieces (usually 1-2 cups).
3. Chop onion into slivers.
4. Heat the wok with remaining oil.
5. Cook meat and onions for about 1 minute.
6. Add rice brought to room temperature, separated with a kitchen fork.
7. Continue cooking until rice is heated through, stirring continuously.
8. Add green onions, peas, bean sprouts, and Mrs. Dash.
9. Cook for another 1-2 minutes.
10. Pour over the water/soy sauce mixture and stir through.
11. Add shredded eggs and serve.
